2603.17973.title: TDAD: Test-Driven Agentic Development - Reducing Code Regressions in AI Coding Agents via Graph-Based Impact Analysis
2603.17973.paper_summary: AI coding agents can resolve real-world software issues, yet they frequently introduce regressions, breaking tests that previously passed. Current benchmarks focus almost exclusively on resolution rate, leaving regression behavior under-studied. This paper presents TDAD (Test-Driven Agentic Development), an open-source tool and benchmark methodology that combines abstract-syntax-tree (AST) based code-test graph construction with weighted impact analysis to surface the tests most likely affected by a proposed change. Evaluated on SWE-bench Verified with two local models (Qwen3-Coder 30B on 100 instances and Qwen3.5-35B-A3B on 25 instances), TDAD's GraphRAG workflow reduced test-level regressions by 70% (6.08% to 1.82%) and improved resolution from 24% to 32% when deployed as an agent skill. A surprising finding is that TDD prompting alone increased regressions (9.94%), revealing that smaller models benefit more from contextual information (which tests to verify) than from procedural instructions (how to do TDD). An autonomous auto-improvement loop raised resolution from 12% to 60% on a 10-instance subset with 0% regression. These findings suggest that for AI agent tool design, surfacing contextual information outperforms prescribing procedural workflows. All code, data, and logs are publicly available at https://github.com/pepealonso95/TDAD.
2603.17973.paper_summary_zh: AI 編碼代理可以解決現實世界的軟體問題，但它們經常引入回歸，導致之前通過的測試失敗。當前的基準幾乎專注於解決率，回歸行為則未受到充分研究。本文提出了 TDAD（測試驅動代理開發），這是一個開源工具和基準方法論，結合了基於抽象語法樹（AST）的代碼測試圖構建和加權影響分析，以顯示最有可能受到提議變更影響的測試。TDAD 的 GraphRAG 工作流程在 SWE-bench 上經過兩個本地模型的驗證（Qwen3-Coder 30B 在 100 個實例上和 Qwen3.5-35B-A3B 在 25 個實例上）後，將測試級回歸減少了 70%（從 6.08% 降至 1.82%），並在作為代理技能部署時將解決率從 24% 提高到 32%。一個令人驚訝的發現是，僅僅使用 TDD 提示就增加了回歸（9.94%），這顯示出較小的模型從上下文信息（哪些測試需要驗證）中獲益更多，而不是從程序性指令（如何進行 TDD）中獲益。自動改進循環將解決率從 12% 提高到 60%，在 10 個實例的子集上回歸為 0%。這些發現表明，對於 AI 代理工具設計，顯示上下文信息的效果超過了規定程序性工作流程的效果。所有代碼、數據和日誌均可在 https://github.com/pepealonso95/TDAD 上公開獲得。
2603.17973.author: Pepe Alonso et.al.
